cards.rules_text: Phaselock [i](Creatures phase out as this deals damage to them. Phaselocked creatures don't phase in at untap unless their controller skips that turn's draw step.)[/i]
cards.flavor_text:
[i]“Only silence… One by one, they took us. Already, we were lost. Only a whisper…
She was here, and then, I was not.”
—Daltae, Norfeln VIIth dig crew[/i]
